firm.notes: Firm markets performance to prospective clients

scenario.description: The firm wants to publish a new performance advertisement with testimonials.

sources.title: Investment Adviser Marketing Rule Overview
sources.excerpt: Advertisements should not include untrue statements of material fact.

sources.title: Testimonials and Endorsements Conditions
sources.excerpt: Certain disclosures are expected when using testimonials or endorsements.

sources.title: Books and Records for Advertisements
sources.excerpt: Advisers are expected to keep records supporting performance-related claims.

sources.title: RIA Internal Supervisory Notes
sources.excerpt: All public marketing content should go through compliance pre-review.
